comment: 38yo female, family history meeting Amsterdam II criteria: mother CRC age 42, maternal grandfather CRC age 56, maternal aunt endometrial cancer age 48 (three Lynch-spectrum cancers across two generations, one first-degree relative, one diagnosis <50). No personal cancer diagnosis. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = genetic counseling + germline MMR/EPCAM panel; alternative = empirical enhanced surveillance (colonoscopy q1-2y from 25, endometrial surveillance from 30-35). Validates v0.2-B Lynch hereditary pilot.
